title: Kofi and the Lost Baby Elephant
synopsis: Young Kofi discovers a lost baby elephant in the savanna and embarks on an adventure to reunite the little one with its family, making new animal friends along the way.

pages.text: Kofi loved exploring the golden savanna near his home. The tall grass swayed in the warm breeze, and colorful birds sang in the acacia trees.

illustration.description: A gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes walking through golden grass in warm savanna colors, acacia trees in background, textured painterly style with bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Kofi walking through tall golden savanna grass with acacia trees

pages.text: Suddenly, Kofi heard a sad trumpeting sound. Behind a large rock, he found a tiny baby elephant with tears in its eyes. 'Where is your mama?' Kofi asked gently.

illustration.description: A gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes kneeling next to a small crying baby elephant behind rocks, warm savanna colors, textured painterly style with expressive animals and bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Kofi comforting a sad baby elephant behind rocks

pages.text: The baby elephant pointed its tiny trunk toward the distant hills. 'Don't worry, little one,' said Kofi. 'I'll help you find your family!'

illustration.description: A gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes standing with the baby elephant pointing toward rolling hills, golden grass, orange sunset colors, textured painterly style with bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Kofi and baby elephant looking toward distant hills

pages.text: As they walked, a friendly giraffe stretched down its long neck. 'I saw a herd of elephants by the big baobab tree,' she said kindly.

illustration.description: A gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes and the baby elephant looking up at a tall giraffe, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly style with bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: A giraffe talking to Kofi and the baby elephant

pages.text: Next, they met a wise old zebra. 'Follow the river,' he suggested, his stripes shining in the golden sunlight. 'The elephants go there to drink water.'

illustration.description: A gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes with the baby elephant meeting a zebra near a winding river, golden grass, warm savanna colors, textured painterly style with expressive animals and bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Kofi, baby elephant, and zebra by a river

pages.text: A family of meerkats popped up from their burrow. 'We know where they are!' they chattered excitedly, pointing with their tiny paws toward a grove of trees.

illustration.description: A gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes and the baby elephant surrounded by several meerkats emerging from holes in the ground, warm savanna colors, textured painterly style with expressive animals and bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Meerkats helping Kofi and the baby elephant

pages.text: As the orange sunset painted the sky, they heard familiar trumpeting sounds. The baby elephant's ears perked up with joy!

illustration.description: A gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes walking with an excited baby elephant toward distant sounds, orange sunset sky, golden grass, textured painterly style with bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Kofi and happy baby elephant walking toward trumpeting sounds at sunset

pages.text: There by the big baobab tree stood the elephant family! Mama elephant wrapped her trunk around her baby, and the whole herd celebrated.

illustration.description: A gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes watching a joyful reunion of elephants near a massive baobab tree, warm savanna colors, expressive animals embracing, textured painterly style with bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Happy elephant family reunion near a baobab tree with Kofi watching

pages.text: The mama elephant gently touched Kofi's shoulder with her trunk as a thank you. Kofi smiled, knowing he had made wonderful new friends in the savanna.

illustration.description: A gouache painting with thick brushstrokes showing Kofi with short cropped hair, rich dark brown skin, bright expressive eyes being gently touched by mama elephant's trunk, surrounded by the elephant family and other savanna animals, warm colors, orange sunset, textured painterly style with expressive animals and bold confident strokes
illustration.alt: Mama elephant thanking Kofi while surrounded by animal friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: gouache painting, thick brushstrokes, warm savanna colors, expressive animals, textured painterly, golden grass, orange sunset, bold confident strokes

questions.question: Who did Kofi find behind the rock?
questions.explanation: Kofi found a sad baby elephant behind the rock who was lost and looking for its family.

questions.question: Which animal told Kofi about the big baobab tree?
questions.explanation: The friendly giraffe stretched down and told Kofi she saw elephants by the big baobab tree.

questions.question: What did the zebra suggest they follow?
questions.explanation: The wise old zebra suggested following the river because elephants go there to drink water.

questions.question: How did mama elephant thank Kofi?
choices: She touched his shoulder with her trunk
questions.explanation: Mama elephant gently touched Kofi's shoulder with her trunk as a way to say thank you for helping her baby.
